with:
  from dataclasses import dataclass
  
  @dataclass
  class Triple:
      subject: str
      predicate: str
      object: str
  
  # EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
  
  def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
      if not triples:
          return ""
  
      # Generate phrases from all triples
      phrases: list[str] = []
      for t in triples:
          s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
  
          # Specific phrasing for common airport predicates
          if p == "cityServed":
              phrases.append(f"{s} serves the city of {o}")
          elif p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
              phrases.append(f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level")
          elif p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
              phrases.append(f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level")
          elif p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres":
              phrases.append(f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level")
          elif p == "location":
              phrases.append(f"{s} is located in {o}")
  ... (70 more lines)
